parameters.content: Phone Number is optional on **Paystack**. False path skips SMS entirely.

## Expected JSON Structure
### from Paystack getCustomer API
**Node:** Fetch Customer From Paystack
[
  {
    "status": true,
    "message": "Customer retrieved",
    "data": {
      "transactions": [],
      "subscriptions": [],
      "authorizations": [],
      "first_name": "Benjamin",
      "last_name": "Nnnaemeka",
      "email": "test@example.com",
      "phone": "8147795152",
      "metadata": {
        "calling_code": "+234"
      },
      "domain": "test",
      "customer_code": "CUS_9cznlwmaz7h3f5c",
      "risk_action": "default",
      "id": 356892686,
      "integration": 1808627,
      "createdAt": "2026-04-18T14:31:07.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2026-04-19T12:23:53.000Z",
      "created_at": "2026-04-18T14:31:07.000Z",
      "updated_at": "2026-04-19T12:23:53.000Z",
      "total_transactions": 0,
      "total_transaction_value": [],
      "dedicated_account": null,
      "dedicated_accounts": [],
      "identified": false,
      "identifications": null
    }
  }
]

assignments.name: display_amount
assignments.value: ={{($('Route By Event Type').item.json.body.data.amount / 100).toLocaleString('en-NG', {style: 'currency', currency: $('Route By Event Type').item.json.body.data.currency})}}

assignments.name: next_retry_at
assignments.value: ={{$('Route By Event Type').item.json.body.data.authorization?.reusable === true ? new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString() : null}}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
 "api_key": "{{ $('Prepare WhatsApp And Slack Context').item.json.termiii_api_key_test }}",
  "to": "{{ $('Extract Failed Payment Fields').item.json.customer_email }}",
  "from": "talert",
  "sms": "Hi, your payment of {{ $('Extract Failed Payment Fields').item.json.display_amount }} failed. Please update your payment details to avoid service interruption. Ref: {{ $('Extract Failed Payment Fields').item.json.reference }}",
  "channel": "generic"
  "type": "plain",
}

parameters.content:
Stores `n8n_execution_id` to allow this execution to be 
cancelled if charge.success fires before sequence completes.

Deletes the charge.failed execution using `n8n_execution_id.` If this fails, customer will still receive SMS after paying.











Continue on Fail enabled. Non-critical, Mark Payment Resolved already ran before this node.

nodes.name: is Retry Card Charge Job Successful?

assignments.name: email_subject
assignments.value: ={{$json.retry_count === 1 ? "Still having trouble processing your payment" : "We've done everything we can"}}

parameters.subject: Still having trouble processing your payment
parameters.html:
=

Attempt 2 of 3

Still Having Trouble

Hi there, we tried your payment of {{$json.display_amount}} again today — still unsuccessful. One more automatic attempt is scheduled.

Balance Due

{{$json.display_amount}}

Next Retry

In 48 Hours
Update Payment Details

Reference: {{$json.reference}}

© 2026

parameters.subject: We've done everything we can
parameters.html:
=

Final Notice

We've Done Everything We Can

Hi there, we made 3 attempts to recover your payment of {{$json.display_amount}} over the past 3 days. All were unsuccessful. Your access may be interrupted soon.

Balance Due

{{$json.display_amount}}

Retries

Exhausted
Update Payment Details

If you need help, just reply to this email.

Reference: {{$json.reference}}

© 2026

parameters.content:
## Handle No Business Found
if the `token` doesn't match any business the node returns empty and every downstream node crashes with undefined errors.

assignments.name: error_message
assignments.value: =Webhook rejected: no business found for token {{$('Receive Paystack Webhook').item.json.query.token}}. Verify the webhook URL is correctly configured in your Paystack dashboard.

parameters.subject: Action required: Your payment failed
parameters.html:
=

Action Required

Payment Unsuccessful

Hi there, your recent payment of {{$json.display_amount}} didn't go through. This is usually just a temporary bank glitch.

Balance Due

{{$json.display_amount}}

Next Retry

In 24 Hours

Our team has been notified and will be in touch shortly to help resolve this.

Reference: {{$json.reference}}

© 2026

nodes.name: Send Recovery Email  Without Deep Link

assignments.name: error_message
assignments.value: =Payment event storage failed for reference {{$('Extract Failed Payment Fields').item.json.reference}}.

parameters.textBody:
=Hi, your payment of *{{$json.display_amount}}* failed. Please update your payment details here:

{{$json.payment_link}}

parameters.content:
HTTP Request used here because each business has its own `whatsapp_phone_id` and `whatsapp_access_token` (stored in Supabase).
Native WhatsApp node only supports static credentials.
